proposal.title: # "Benbodhi: Decoded" - Submit Ben's documentary to 48 film festivals
proposal.description:
# "Benbodhi: Decoded" - Submit Ben's documentary to 48 film festivals

# "Benbodhi: Decoded" - Submit Ben's documentary to 48 film festivals

[![Benbodhi-Decoded-Thumbnail-1.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/3xHz0wCb/Benbodhi-Decoded-Thumbnail-1.jpg "https://postimg.cc/Mvd9hqLy")](https://postimg.cc/Mvd9hqLy)

**TL;DR**  **Let’s send "Benbodhi: Decoded" to 48 of the best-rated film and documentary festivals around the world.**

---

**Budget: $2,854.00 USDC**

---

📽️ **THE PLAN**

Most Nounsfolk who watched Ben's film had great things to say about it.

Let's give it one more push into the unknown and try and inspire a new audience.

Here is the film on YouTube: [https://youtu.be/B9xxBuckhxs](https://youtu.be/B9xxBuckhxs)

With "Non-Fungible Aotearoa" we were selected by 8 festivals in 2024  thanks to props 71 and 405:

[![Page-1.png](https://i.postimg.cc/hjM5H8Hk/Page-1.png "https://postimg.cc/8JJ4vvk4")](https://postimg.cc/8JJ4vvk4)

I am confident Ben's documentary will do much better.
What do you say?

I will front the soundtrack cost out of pocket and Nouns can fund the festivals' fees.

Here is the list:

[![Ben-film-festival.png](https://i.postimg.cc/8c9tSZw0/Ben-film-festival.png "https://postimg.cc/sGPpP9kY")](https://postimg.cc/sGPpP9kY)

---

🫂  **THE TEAM**

- Leo Clark (Director/Producer) [https://warpcast.com/leoclark.eth](https://warpcast.com/leoclark.eth) Trying to inspire the world to join our onchain journey.
  One documentary at a time. 

I would love to count on your support this time.

Thank you for reading and considering our proposal 🙏
